## aTx.class
StackMapTable
turnduration seconds [(allFight | af)] : set the turn duration to the value given (in seconds). If the 'allFight' parameter is used, then the given turn duration will be active for the rest of the current fight.Note that this turn duration only occurs on controllable characters (not IA).On the other hand if the 'allFight' parameter is not used, the given turn duration will only be active for the current turn after what the turn duration will be set back to its default value.

## aSY.class
BootstrapMethods
Erreur de syntaxe dans la date de d├®part - taper setBonusFactor help pour voir la syntaxe
Erreur de syntaxe dans la date de fin - taper setBonusFactor help pour voir la syntaxe
StackMapTable
setBonusFactor|sbf help : show full documentation
setBonusFactor|sbf : show current bonuses and provided events
setBonusFactor|sbf fxp : show current xp bonus
setBonusFactor|sbf fxp instanceId : same for an instance
setBonusFactor|sbf fxp -1.0 : reset bonus xp for all the server
setBonusFactor|sbf fxp -1.0 instanceId : same for instance
setBonusFactor|sbf fxp value startDate endDate : apply value as xp bonus from startDate to endDate
setBonusFactor|sbf fxp value startDate endDate instanceId : same for instance
Date syntax : dd/mm/yyyy hh:mm
replace fxp by cxp : craft xp
replace fxp by k : money loot
replace fxp by loot : number of loots try
replace fxp by gblf : bonus learning factor for guilds
replace fxp by pp : prospection rate
replace fxp by pvp : pvp merit and glory orbs limit
replace fxp by rights : id of subscription right
